user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a pre joining HR approver, so that HR-side pre-joining tasks are routed for approval
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Pre Joining HR Approvers screen; When I click Add new offer approver and select the approver; Then the HR approver is created and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit a pre joining HR approver, so that I can update who approves pre-joining HR tasks
acceptance_criteria: Given an approver is listed; When I click Edit and change the approver; Then the update is saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the configured pre joining HR approvers, so that I know who is responsible for approvals
acceptance_criteria: Given approvers exist; When I open the list; Then the approvers column shows each configured approver
